mappings.reason: Mandates secure management protocols (SSH/HTTPS) and bans insecure ones (Telnet/HTTP), enforcing approved cryptographic technology for administrative access channels as a subset of CRY-07's scope.

Requires secure network management and communication protocols (e.g., 802.1X, WPA2 Enterprise) which inherently rely on strong industry-standard ciphers, satisfying CRY-07 for network infrastructure operations.
